_doc: Boss-key farm/redeem locations. Coords are in the same world-coord system as maxroll-map.json (x,y), passed through worldToLatLng() in main.js. Each entry is a fixed in-world location where players go to obtain or use a boss summoning material. Dynamic sources (Helltide chests for Living Steel, NMD chests for Distilled Fear) belong to their own layers (chests / livingsteel) — those rotate so they can't be a single static marker.
_curation_notes: Tree of Whispers: Hawezar — turn in Grim Favors for Whisper Caches, Varshan body parts (Malignant Heart / Trembling Hand / Blackened Femur / Gurgling Head)
Pit Entrance: Cerrigar, Scosglen — use Stygian Stones to enter The Pit
World Boss arenas (Hanged Man's Hall, Hall of the Penitent, Gaping Crevasse, Tree of Whispers, Glacial Fissure, Darkened Way): consume their respective summoning materials to summon the boss
Iron Wolves Camp: Kehjistan — Iron Wolves vendor sells Stygian Stones for Iron Wolves Honor

markers.name: Tree of Whispers
markers.desc: Whisper Caches reward Malignant Heart, Trembling Hand, Blackened Femur, Gurgling Head — Echo of Varshan summoning materials.

markers.name: Pit Entrance — Cerrigar
markers.desc: Use Stygian Stones to enter The Pit. The Pit drops Distilled Fear and other endgame materials.

markers.name: Iron Wolves Camp
markers.desc: Iron Wolves vendor sells Stygian Stones for Honor. Helltide objectives + bounty boards earn Honor here.

markers.name: Hanged Man's Hall
markers.desc: Andariel arena. Use 2× Sandscorched Shackles + 2× Pincushioned Doll to summon her here.

markers.name: Gaping Crevasse
markers.desc: Duriel arena. Use 2× Mucus-Slick Egg + 2× Shard of Agony to summon him here.

markers.name: Hall of the Penitent
markers.desc: Grigoire arena. Living Steel charges the altar here.

markers.name: Darkened Way
markers.desc: Lord Zir arena. Exquisite Blood charges the altar here.

markers.name: Glacial Fissure
markers.desc: Beast in Ice arena. Distilled Fear + Sigil charges the altar here.
